# maximo-expo / files

**Generated files from the migration scripts — commit these.**

| File | Generated by | Run when |
|------|-------------|----------|
| `moodle-migration.xlsx` | `node scripts/moodle-to-excel.js` | Step 3 |
| `post-import.sql` | `node scripts/moodle-to-excel.js` | Step 4b |
| `import-documents.sql` | `node scripts/ftp-to-r2.js` | Step 5 (auto) |
| `ftp-progress.json` | `node scripts/ftp-to-r2.js` | Step 5 (auto) — **keep, needed for re-upload recovery** |
| `quiz-import.sql` | `node scripts/generate-quiz-sql.js` | Step 7a — do NOT run directly |
| `quiz-assignments.sql` | Split script (Step 7b) | Step 7c |
| `quiz-questions.sql` | Split script (Step 7b) | — |
| `quiz-questions-filtered.sql` | Filter script (Step 7d) | Step 7d |

> The `.xlsx`, `.json`, and `.sql` files should be committed here.
> The source CSVs go in `../queries/` and are gitignored.
